name: HERBIE

abilities.name: Flameborn
abilities.text: When this model would suffer damage from a Burning token, it instead heals that amount.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: The Madness Engine
abilities.text: After an enemy model with a Burning token within 6" is killed, this model infuses a (soulstone).

actions.name: Thermite Injection
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Burning token, this action has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.

actions.name: Living Spark
actions.costs_and_restrictions: X is equal to 2 plus the level of this crew's fervor bar.
actions.effects: All models within (Y)X" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or resolve their Burning tokens.

triggers.name: Collapsing Star
triggers.text: Choose toward or away. Move all models that failed this duel up to 4" in the chosen direction from this model.

extraction_notes: Living Spark uses (Y) symbol before X" in the effects text - interpreted as pulse range indicator based on context
